mapper.select: select * from (select n.id,n.title,to_char(n.addtime,'yyyy-mm-dd') as addtime,t.real_name as fbr from newstb n left join teacher t on n.fbr=t.id where n.type = #{type, jdbcType=INTEGER} order by n.addtime desc) where rownum<20

select count(*) as num from newstb
where type = #{type, jdbcType=INTEGER}

select n.id as id, n.title as title, to_char(n.addtime,'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as addtime, n.content as content, t.real_name as fbr, n.type as type from newstb n left join teacher t on n.fbr=t.id where n.id=#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NEWS_SEQ.currval FROM DUAL
insert into newstb(title,content,addtime,fbr,type) values(#{title},#{content},#{addtime},#{fbr},#{type})
mapper.select:
WITH eids AS ( SELECT e.id AS eid FROM examinfo e WHERE e.teacherid = #{tid}
UNION SELECT tq.eid FROM teacher_question tq WHERE tq.tid = #{tid}
UNION SELECT tp.eid FROM teacher_paper tp WHERE tp.tid = #{tid} ), perm_flag AS ( SELECT tp.eid, MAX(CASE WHEN tp.pid = '35' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS can_first_verify, MAX(CASE WHEN tp.pid = '36' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS can_last_verify FROM teacher_paper tp WHERE tp.tid = #{tid} GROUP BY tp.eid ) SELECT e.id AS id, e.cid AS cid, e.cname AS cname, e.ename AS ename, TO_CHAR(e.begindate,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS begindate, TO_CHAR(e.enddate,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS enddate, e.teacherid AS teacherid, t.real_name AS teachername, e.bid AS bid, e.autotest AS autotest, e.subjectsum AS subjectsum, e.bsum AS bsum, e.chosen AS chosen, e.aorb AS aorb, e.type AS type, e.cpid AS cpid, 0 AS a_snum, b.subjectsum AS bnum, #{tid} AS teaID, CASE WHEN e.teacherid = #{tid} THEN 1 WHEN NVL(pf.can_first_verify, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS allowFirstVerify, CASE WHEN NVL(pf.can_last_verify, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS allowLastVerify,
CASE WHEN e.teacherid = #{tid} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS verifyAgain,
CASE WHEN e.state = 3 AND e.teacherid = #{tid} THEN CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(e.begindate) AND TRUNC(e.enddate) THEN 4 WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) > TRUNC(e.enddate) THEN 5 ELSE 4 END ELSE e.state END AS state,
CASE e.state WHEN 0 THEN '未审核' WHEN 1 THEN '待初审' WHEN 2 THEN '待终审' WHEN 7 THEN '审核不通过' WHEN 8 THEN '已收卷' WHEN 3 THEN CASE WHEN e.teacherid != #{tid} THEN NULL WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(e.begindate) AND TRUNC(e.enddate) THEN '考试中' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) > TRUNC(e.enddate) THEN '待收卷' ELSE '通过审核待考' END ELSE NULL END AS state_desc
FROM eids x JOIN examinfo e ON e.id = x.eid LEFT JOIN perm_flag pf ON pf.eid = e.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON t.id = e.teacherid LEFT JOIN examinfo b ON b.id = e.bid WHERE e.state NOT IN (6, -1, -2) AND e.mobile IN (0, 2) AND e.aorb = 0 AND ( (e.state = 0 AND e.teacherid = #{tid}) OR (e.state = 1 AND (e.teacherid = #{tid} OR NVL(pf.can_first_verify,0) = 1)) OR (e.state IN (2, 7, 8)) OR (e.state = 3 AND e.teacherid = #{tid}) ) ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(e.id) DESC
select g.name as gname, s.name as sname from examobject eo left join grade g on eo.grade = g.id left join specialty s on eo.specialtyid = s.id where eo.eid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
